data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for GPS tracking for vehicles.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'GPS tracking for vehicles', but there is no evidence provided that confirms this functionality is implemented or tested. The linked use case mentions the need for GPS tracking, yet the evidence does not include any checks or confirmations related to this specific requirement. This indicates a clear gap in the coverage of the requirement as outlined in the exploratory step.
gaps: No evidence of GPS tracking functionality being validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the GPS tracking requirement.
